sentences.arabic: سَافَرَتِ الْعَائِلَةُ إِلَى مَدِينَةٍ جَمِيلَةٍ عَلَى الْبَحْرِ.
sentences.translation: Porodica je putovala u lijep grad na moru.
sentences.translationEn: The family traveled to a beautiful city by the sea.

sentences.arabic: نَزَلُوا فِي فُنْدُقٍ صَغِيرٍ قَرِيبٍ مِنَ الشَّاطِئِ.
sentences.translation: Odsjeli su u malom hotelu blizu plaže.
sentences.translationEn: They stayed in a small hotel near the beach.

sentences.arabic: فَتَحَ الْأَبُ النَّافِذَةَ وَنَظَرَ إِلَى الْبَحْرِ.
sentences.translation: Otac je otvorio prozor i pogledao prema moru.
sentences.translationEn: The father opened the window and looked at the sea.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتِ الْأُمُّ: هَذَا الْمَكَانُ جَمِيلٌ جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Majka je rekla: Ovo mjesto je veoma lijepo.
sentences.translationEn: The mother said: This place is very beautiful.
